title: Pearlised Red Hand-Tied Vase Florist Bouquet Box, Presentation/Transporter Box/Flower Plant Aqua Boxes, (Pack of 30)
features: 30 x Top quality card Vase/Bouquet Box - Pearlised Red
Beautiful Presentation Boxes, Perfect for Flowers or other things such as Sweet trees, Chocolate Presentation Gifts
Thick card construction, Eco Friendly, Wide base design for better stability
These will arrive Flat-Packed and are very easy to assemble
Transporter vases offer an attractive yet affordable and safe solution for displaying and transporting bouquets.
Dimensions: 25cm high x 17.5 wide base x 11cm wide neck
These are great for flowers/sweet presentation gifts, Ideal for weddings, parties, anniversary ideas etc.
description: Floralcraft Hand-Tied Vase Flower Bouquet Box - Pearlised Red, Thick card construction and Wide base design for better stability. Arrive flat packed for easy storage. Size: 17.5 x 11 x 25cm Quantity: 30 Vases
